steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
Use $g(5)=37$ in the function $g(x)=6x+a$. Replacing $x$ with $5$ gives an equation for the constant.
$$6(5)+a=37$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content:
Compute the product, then subtract $30$ from both sides to isolate $a$.
$$30+a=37$$
$$a=7$$
The answer is C.
